files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info (lines 112-127) and get_ts_language (lines 240-241)
Added tsx extension mapping (lines 56-57) and supported language entry (lines 90-91)

compile_belief: Code changes are syntactically correct and follow established patterns in the codebase
compile_belief_reason: All tsx arms use the typescript module namespace (typescript::ELEMENT_QUERY, typescript::CALL_QUERY, etc.) as required, use LANGUAGE_TSX constant correctly, and are placed immediately after typescript arms as specified. Feature gates match the pattern throughout the codebase.
